CAN interface

OBD Information

Protocol: KWP2000
Send ID:
Recv ID:
Baudrate:
Func Addr: 3A
Func Name: CANAdapter

  {
    "diagversion": "4",
    "supplier": "174",
    "soft": "0000",
    "version": "0000"

[
  {
    "minbytes": 1,
    "replybytes": "7E",
    "sentbytes": "3E",
    "name": "Tester Present",
    "deny_sds": []
  },
  {
    "minbytes": 2,
    "replybytes": "7B00",
    "manualsend": true,
    "sentbytes": "3B0000",
    "name": "Write Data",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "sendbyte_dataitems": {

        "firstbyte": 2
      },
      "parameters": {
        "firstbyte": 3

        "firstbyte": 2
      }
    }

    "replybytes": "618000000000000400000000000000000000000000000000000000",
    "sentbytes": "2180",
    "name": "Read Data LID_ID",

        "firstbyte": 3,
        "ref": true

        "ref": true
      },

        "ref": true

        "firstbyte": 17,
        "ref": true
      },

        "firstbyte": 19,
        "ref": true
      },

        "firstbyte": 23,
        "ref": true
      }
